recommendations.title: Bugonia
recommendations.overview: Two conspiracy obsessed young men kidnap the high-powered CEO of a major company, convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth.

recommendations.title: Crazy in Alabama
recommendations.overview: An abused wife heads to California to become a movie star while her nephew back in Alabama has to deal with a racially-motivated murder involving a corrupt sheriff.

recommendations.title: Loving Adults
recommendations.overview: The thin line between love and hate turns deadly when a wife discovers her husband’s affair — and they both take extreme measures to get what they want.

recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatric intern unearths secrets about the mental health facility in which he works.

recommendations.title: The Other Man
recommendations.overview: The story of a husband who suspects his wife of adultery, and sets out to track down the other man in her life.

recommendations.title: Upgraded
recommendations.overview: Ana is an ambitious intern dreaming of a career in the art world while trying to impress her demanding boss Claire. When she's upgraded to first class on a work trip, she meets handsome Will, and Ana pretends to be her boss– a white lie that sets off

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.

recommendations.title: Original Sin
recommendations.overview: A young man is plunged into a life of subterfuge, deceit and mistaken identity in pursuit of a femme fatale whose heart is never quite within his grasp.

recommendations.title: Struggle for Life
